name: token_ids_tiny
source: Synthetic token IDs hand-written for Open-Alexandros correctness tests.
license: MIT License, same as the repository.
allowed_use: Unit, integration, and CI smoke tests only.
not_for: Pretraining, quality claims, benchmark comparisons, or model release claims.
notes: The fixture is pre-tokenized; it is not natural-language text.
The fixture intentionally avoids any external corpus or tokenizer ownership.
